title: ExposoGraph 3.0 Interface Contract (Phase 2)
description: Schema for a single interface record within data/ontology/interfaces.json interfaces array.

description.description: What this interface represents and what conforming modules must do.

extends.description: Parent interface_id. Null for the root Module interface.

required_fields.description: Core-schema field names that any conforming module MUST populate.

required_input_port_types.description: Typed input port contracts that conforming modules must satisfy.

required_output_port_types.description: Typed output port contracts that conforming modules must satisfy.

allowed_mechanism_types.description: If present, limits mechanism_type to this list.

allowed_equation_types.description: If present, limits equation_type to this list.

maturity_floor.description: Minimum maturity_class required for a conforming module.

port_role.description: Semantic role of this port contract.

dtype.description: Required port datatype (type_id from port_types.json), or null for generic typed-port check.

required.description: Whether a port with this dtype is required.
